nasb.text: They have also cast lots for My people, Traded a boy for a harlot And sold a girl for wine that they may drink.

esv.text: and have cast lots for my people, and have traded a boy for a prostitute, and have sold a girl for wine and have drunk it.

cnv.text: 他們為我的子民抽籤， 用男童交換妓女， 女童被賣換酒喝。

ccb.text: 他们抽签分了我的子民，将男童换妓女，卖女童买酒喝。
